title: Debugging SQL Queries
scenario: Given a simple SQL query, write a prompt that will generate a corrected version of the query. The query involves retrieving all employees with a salary above $50,000 from the 'employees' table in a database. The LLM should assume a standard database schema and not require any external knowledge.

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the generated SQL query is syntactically correct.
Verify if the generated SQL query meets the given constraints.
Check if the generated SQL query correctly retrieves employees with a salary above $50,000 from the 'employees' table.
